title: Technical Manager
description:
Major works scope as following:

· Setting up company’s technical standardization system, documentation filing

system, technical library, technical document & drawing template etc., share to

project team when new project awarded.

· Organize to provide technical support during tender stage & coordinate with

internal/external parties.

· Organize to brief the technical planning to project team upon new project award.

Early involvement for technical planning and implementation during

preconstruction stage to optimize cost & time.

· Assist project to review on shop drawing/method statement/material submission

scheduling, monitor the quality & schedule of technical documents submission if

necessary.

· Regular site visit & assist project team on solving critical technical issues if

necessary, such as major construction method/technology, ERSS, VE & Innovation

etc.

· Review technical deviation which submitted by individual project & provide

technical advice.

· Organize project technical audit & feedback comments to project team.

· Organize internal technical meeting & technical training/sharing.

· Organize project team to work out the report which highlight common good

practice and problem solving to share with relevant staff.

· Involve technical staff recruitment interview & provide training to new technical

staff.

· Evaluate technical staff performance & feedback to admin department if

necessary.

postedCompany.description:
Qingjian International (South Pacific) holds a General Building A1 Licence, the highest classification for contractors’ regulation issued by BCA, allowing the company to tender for public sector construction projects of unlimited contract value.


It is currently certified under ISO 9001, ISO 14001 and OHSAS 18001 which underline its quality standards. It is also a bizSAFE Partner and bizSAFE STAR certificate holder granted by the Workplace Safety & Health Council.

Qingjian International (South Pacific) has established a strong track record. It has completed a range of projects, from residential, commercial, institutional to industrial in the private and public sectors.

b) ROSPA GOLD safety award 

c) HDB construction safety award;

Numerous BCA Construction Excellence Award

*Luban Award is the top engineering and construction award in China organized by China Construction Industry Association. The award is based on strict selection methods and reporting, assessment procedures and is widely acknowledged as the highest quality award in the Chinese construction industry.
